expectations.text: Restates the requested behavior before implementation
expectations.evidence: Response jumps to implemented summary; it does not restate behavior before implementation.

expectations.text: Surfaces relevant blind spots such as whether dry-run should skip all writes and preserve existing output/exit behavior
expectations.evidence: Mentions dry-run does not create output directory or write files.

expectations.text: States reasonable defaults instead of asking unnecessary mechanical questions
expectations.evidence: Uses reasonable defaults and does not ask mechanical questions.

expectations.text: Proceeds with implementation rather than recommending brainstorming
